aopsTopic: Shapes: area and perimeter of polygons
description: Beast Academy 3A covers area and perimeter with creative puzzles and irregular shapes
notes: CCSS 3.MD.5-8. AoPS emphasizes mathematical reasoning over memorization.

description: Beast Academy 3B covers multiplication strategies including arrays, skip counting, and distributive property
notes: CCSS 3.OA. AoPS uses puzzles and story problems to build deep multiplication understanding.

aopsTopic: Fractions on a number line and equivalence
description: Beast Academy 3C introduces fractions using number lines and visual models
notes: CCSS 3.NF. AoPS emphasizes fraction concepts before procedures.

description: Beast Academy 4A covers angle measurement, types of triangles, and properties of quadrilaterals
notes: CCSS 4.G. AoPS introduces deductive reasoning about shapes.

description: Beast Academy 4B extends multiplication to 2-digit by 2-digit with estimation and mental math
notes: CCSS 4.NBT.5. AoPS emphasizes multiple strategies and number sense.

description: Beast Academy 4C covers comparing fractions and adding/subtracting fractions with unlike denominators
notes: CCSS 4.NF.1-3. AoPS uses visual models and puzzle contexts.

description: Beast Academy 5A covers volume and surface area of prisms and pyramids
notes: CCSS 5.MD.3-5. AoPS extends 3D geometry with decomposition problems.

aopsTopic: Statistics: mean, median, mode, and data analysis
description: Beast Academy 5B covers statistical measures and data interpretation
notes: CCSS 5.MD.2. AoPS uses real-world datasets and puzzle contexts.

description: AoPS Intro Algebra introduces variables, expressions, and solving linear equations through rich word problems
notes: CCSS 7.EE. AoPS Intro Algebra is designed for students ready for abstract algebra.

description: AoPS covers ratios and proportional reasoning with competition-style word problems
notes: CCSS 7.RP. AoPS extends to complex multi-step percent problems.

aopsTopic: Quadratic equations and the quadratic formula
description: AoPS Intro Algebra covers complete quadratic equation solving including the quadratic formula
notes: CCSS Algebra 1 standard. AoPS reaches quadratics in the Intro Algebra book.

description: AoPS introduces systematic counting using the multiplication principle, permutations, and combinations
notes: CCSS Statistics at grade 11. AoPS covers at grade 7 for competition preparation.

description: AoPS Number Theory covers divisibility rules, prime factorization, GCD, LCM, and Euclidean algorithm
notes: CCSS grade 6 standard but AoPS goes much deeper with Euclidean algorithm and competition problems.

description: AoPS Intro Geometry covers formal proofs of triangle congruence (SSS, SAS, ASA, AAS) and similarity
notes: CCSS Geometry standard. AoPS treats geometry with rigorous proof-based approach.

aopsTopic: Circles: arc length, sector area, inscribed angles
description: AoPS covers circle theorems, arc length, sector area, and inscribed angle theorem
notes: CCSS Geometry standard. AoPS introduces circle theorems with proof-based approach.
